refnamediv.refpurpose: Get the count of logs in the buffer

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description;
public static intSeasLog::getBufferCount
Gets the number of log entries currently held in the memory buffer, waiting to be flushed to the data store.
The counter is increased by one for every buffered log entry and reset to zero each time the buffer is flushed, which happens automatically once the count reaches seaslog.buffer_size. Buffering itself is controlled by seaslog.use_buffer and seaslog.buffer_disabled_in_cli; see SeasLog::getBufferEnabled.
